# #9943 on-device finding (2/2) — Android @capacitor/network is ABSENT; window online/offline is reliable
# API-34 emulator, ai.elizaos.app real WebView via CDP; toggles wifi+data off/on.

init: {"onLine":true,"hasNetworkPlugin":false,"capacitorGetStatus":"no-plugin","capacitorAddListenerError":null}
disabling connectivity (wifi + data off)...
re-enabling connectivity...
window online/offline events: ["offline","online"]
Capacitor networkStatusChange (connected) events: []
